title: Supreme Administrative Court of Bulgaria ransomware incident

extortion.description: The Supreme Administrative Court provides for supreme judicial supervision over the precise and uniform application of laws in administrative justice. The Supreme Administrative Court hears complaints and protests against the actions of the Council of Ministers, the Prime Minister, Deputy Prime Ministers, Ministers, heads of other positions directly subordinate to the Council of Ministers, Acts of the Supreme Judicial Council, Acts of the Bulgarian Citizen Bank, Acts of Regional Regional Governing Acts, as well as other actions specified in the law; This is pronounced in disputes about the legality of taxes; It has reviewed the quality of judicial acts issued in administrative cases and is considering requests for annulment of compulsory courts' decisions in administrative cases.
